hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; then m=$(grep -nP "[\x{2014}\x{2013}]" "$f"); if [ -n "$m" ]; then echo "Em/en dash (U+2014/U+2013) found in $f. This repo bans them; replace with a colon, comma, or period:" >&2; echo "$m" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
